traits.name: Amphibious
text: The aboleth can breathe air and water.

traits.name: Eldritch Restoration
text: If destroyed, the aboleth gains a new body in {@dice 5d10} days, reviving with all its {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} in the Far Realm or another location chosen by the DM.

traits.name: Legendary Resistance (3/Day, or 4/Day in Lair)
text: If the aboleth fails a saving throw, it can choose to succeed instead.

traits.name: Mucus Cloud
text: While underwater, the aboleth is surrounded by mucus. {@actSave con} {@dc 14}, each creature in a 5-foot {@variantrule Emanation [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Emanation} originating from the aboleth at the end of the aboleth's turn. {@actSaveFail} The target is cursed. Until the curse ends, the target's skin becomes slimy, the target can breathe air and water, and it can't regain {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} unless it is underwater.

While the cursed creature is outside a body of water, the creature takes 6 ({@damage 1d12}) Acid damage at the end of every 10 minutes unless moisture is applied to its skin before those minutes have passed.

traits.name: Probing Telepathy
text: If a creature the aboleth can see communicates telepathically with the aboleth, the aboleth learns the creature's greatest desires.

actions.name: Multiattack
text: The aboleth makes two Tentacle attacks and uses either Consume Memories or Dominate Mind if available.

actions.name: Tentacle
text: {@atkr m} {@hit 9}, reach 15 ft. {@h}12 ({@damage 2d6 + 5}) Bludgeoning damage. If the target is a Large or smaller creature, it has the {@condition Grappled|XPHB} condition (escape {@dc 14}) from one of four tentacles.

actions.name: Consume Memories
text: {@actSave int} {@dc 16}, one creature within 30 feet that is {@condition Charmed|XPHB} or {@condition Grappled|XPHB} by the aboleth. {@actSaveFail} 10 ({@damage 3d6}) Psychic damage. {@actSaveSuccess} Half damage. {@actSaveSuccessOrFail} The aboleth gains the target's memories if the target is a Humanoid and is reduced to 0 {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} by this action.

actions.name: Dominate Mind (2/Day)
text: {@actSave wis} {@dc 16}, one creature the aboleth can see within 30 feet. {@actSaveFail} The target has the {@condition Charmed|XPHB} condition until the aboleth dies or is on a different plane of existence from the target. While {@condition Charmed|XPHB}, the target acts as an ally to the aboleth and is under its control while within 60 feet of it. In addition, the aboleth and the target can communicate telepathically with each other over any distance.
The target repeats the save whenever it takes damage as well as after every 24 hours it spends at least 1 mile away from the aboleth, ending the effect on itself on a success.

legendary.name: Lash
text: The aboleth makes one Tentacle attack.

legendary.name: Psychic Drain
text: If the aboleth has at least one creature {@condition Charmed|XPHB} or {@condition Grappled|XPHB}, it uses Consume Memories and regains 5 ({@dice 1d10}) {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB}.

While attached to a target, the darkmantle can attack only the target but has {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on its attack rolls. Its {@variantrule Speed|XPHB} becomes 0, it can't benefit from any bonus to its {@variantrule Speed|XPHB}, and it moves with the target.

A creature can take an action to try to detach the darkmantle from itself, doing so with a successful {@dc 13} Strength ({@skill Athletics|XPHB}) check. On its turn, the darkmantle can detach itself by using 5 feet of movement.

Whenever the whirlwind enters a creature's space or a creature enters the whirlwind, that creature is subjected to the following effect. {@actSave str} {@dc 17} (a creature makes this save only once per turn, and the djinni is unaffected). {@actSaveFail} While in the whirlwind, the target has the {@condition Restrained|XPHB} condition and moves with the whirlwind. At the start of each of its turns, the {@condition Restrained|XPHB} target takes 21 ({@damage 6d6}) Thunder damage. At the end of each of its turns, the target repeats the save, ending the effect on itself on a success.

On a successful check, the target escapes and enters the nearest unoccupied space. {@actSaveSuccess} Half damage, and the target moves to an unoccupied space within 5 feet of the cube. The spell fails and is wasted if the target is under the effect of the {@spell Protection from Evil and Good|XPHB} spell or within a {@spell Magic Circle|XPHB} spell.

If the target takes damage from the {@spell Dream|XPHB} spell, the target's {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB|Hit Point} maximum decreases by an amount equal to that damage. traits.name: Water Breathing
text: The seahorse can breathe only underwater.

actions.name: Bubble Dash
text: While underwater, the seahorse moves up to its {@variantrule Swim Speed|XPHB} without provoking {@action Opportunity Attack|XPHB|Opportunity Attacks}.

name: Shadow
immunities: necrotic; poison; exhaustion; frightened; grappled; paralyzed; petrified; poisoned; prone; restrained; unconscious

traits.name: Amorphous
text: The shadow can move through a space as narrow as 1 inch without expending extra movement to do so.

traits.name: Sunlight Weakness
text: While in sunlight, the shadow has {@variantrule Disadvantage|XPHB} on {@variantrule D20 Test|XPHB|D20 Tests}.

actions.name: Draining Swipe
text: {@atkr m} {@hit 4}, reach 5 ft. {@h}5 ({@damage 1d6 + 2}) Necrotic damage, and the target's Strength score decreases by {@dice 1d4}. The target dies if this reduces that score to 0. If a Humanoid is slain by this attack, a Shadow rises from the corpse {@dice 1d4} hours later.

bonusActions.name: Shadow Stealth
text: While in {@variantrule Dim Light|XPHB} or {@variantrule Darkness|XPHB}, the shadow takes the {@action Hide|XPHB} action.

traits.name: Lightning Absorption
text: Whenever the shambling mound is subjected to Lightning damage, it regains a number of {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} equal to the Lightning damage dealt.

actions.name: Multiattack
text: The shambling mound makes three Charged Tendril attacks. It can replace one attack with a use of Engulf.

actions.name: Charged Tendril
text: {@atkr m} {@hit 7}, reach 10 ft. {@h}7 ({@damage 1d6 + 4}) Bludgeoning damage plus 5 ({@damage 2d4}) Lightning damage. If the target is a Medium or smaller creature, the shambling mound pulls the target 5 feet straight toward itself.

actions.name: Engulf
text: {@actSave str} {@dc 15}, one Medium or smaller creature within 5 feet. {@actSaveFail} The target is pulled into the shambling mound's space and has the {@condition Grappled|XPHB} condition (escape {@dc 14}). Until the grapple ends, the target has the {@condition Blinded|XPHB} and {@condition Restrained|XPHB} conditions, and it takes 10 ({@damage 3d6}) Lightning damage at the start of each of its turns. When the shambling mound moves, the {@condition Grappled|XPHB} target moves with it, costing it no extra movement. The shambling mound can have only one creature {@condition Grappled|XPHB} by this action at a time.

name: Shield Guardian
languages: understands commands given in any language but can't speak
immunities: poison; charmed; exhaustion; frightened; paralyzed; petrified; poisoned

traits.name: Bound
text: The guardian is magically bound to an amulet. While the guardian and its amulet are on the same plane of existence, the amulet's wearer can telepathically call the guardian to travel to it, and the guardian knows the distance and direction to the amulet. If the guardian is within 60 feet of the amulet's wearer, half of any damage the wearer takes (round up) is transferred to the guardian.

traits.name: Regeneration
text: The guardian regains 10 {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} at the start of each of its turns if it has at least 1 {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB|Hit Point}.

traits.name: Spell Storing
text: A spellcaster who wears the guardian's amulet can cause the guardian to store one spell of level 4 or lower. To do so, the wearer must cast the spell on the guardian while within 5 feet of it. The spell has no effect but is stored within the guardian. Any previously stored spell is lost when a new spell is stored. The guardian can cast the spell stored with any parameters set by the original caster, requiring no spell components and using the caster's spellcasting ability. The stored spell is then lost.

actions.name: Multiattack
text: The guardian makes two Fist attacks.

actions.name: Fist
text: {@atkr m} {@hit 7}, reach 10 ft. {@h}11 ({@damage 2d6 + 4}) Bludgeoning damage plus 7 ({@damage 2d6}) Force damage.

reactions.name: Protection
text: {@actTrigger} An attack roll hits the wearer of the guardian's amulet while the wearer is within 5 feet of the guardian. {@actResponse} The wearer gains a +5 bonus to AC, including against the triggering attack and possibly causing it to miss, until the start of the guardian's next turn.

reactions.name: Shriek
text: {@actTrigger} A creature or a source of {@variantrule Bright Light|XPHB} moves within 30 feet of the shrieker. {@actResponse} The shrieker emits a shriek audible within 300 feet of itself for 1 minute or until the shrieker dies.

actions.name: Multiattack
text: The dragon makes two Rend attacks.

actions.name: Rend
text: {@atkr m} {@hit 6}, reach 5 ft. {@h}9 ({@damage 1d10 + 4}) Piercing damage.

actions.name: Cold Breath {@recharge 5}
text: {@actSave con} {@dc 13}, each creature in a 15-foot {@variantrule Cone [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Cone}. {@actSaveFail} 18 ({@damage 4d8}) Cold damage. {@actSaveSuccess} Half damage.

actions.name: Paralyzing Breath
text: {@actSave con} {@dc 13}, each creature in a 15-foot {@variantrule Cone [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Cone}. {@actSaveFail 1} The target has the {@condition Incapacitated|XPHB} condition until the end of its next turn, when it repeats the save. {@actSaveFail 2} The target has the {@condition Paralyzed|XPHB} condition, and it repeats the save at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success. After 1 minute, it succeeds automatically.

name: Skeleton
languages: understands Common plus one other language but can't speak

actions.name: Shortsword
text: {@atkr m} {@hit 5}, reach 5 ft. {@h}6 ({@damage 1d6 + 3}) Piercing damage.

actions.name: Shortbow
text: {@atkr r} {@hit 5}, range 80/320 ft. {@h}6 ({@damage 1d6 + 3}) Piercing damage.

name: Solar
immunities: poison; radiant; charmed; exhaustion; frightened; poisoned

traits.name: Divine Awareness
text: The solar knows if it hears a lie.

traits.name: Exalted Restoration
text: If the solar dies outside Mount Celestia, its body disappears, and it gains a new body instantly, reviving with all its {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} somewhere in Mount Celestia.

traits.name: Legendary Resistance (4/Day)
text: If the solar fails a saving throw, it can choose to succeed instead.

traits.name: Magic Resistance
text: The solar has {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

actions.name: Multiattack
text: The solar makes two Flying Sword attacks. It can replace one attack with a use of Slaying Bow.

actions.name: Flying Sword
text: {@atkr m,r} {@hit 15}, reach 10 ft. or range 120 ft. {@h}22 ({@damage 4d6 + 8}) Slashing damage plus 36 ({@damage 8d8}) Radiant damage. {@hom}The sword magically returns to the solar's hand or hovers within 5 feet of the solar immediately after a ranged attack.

actions.name: Slaying Bow
text: {@actSave dex} {@dc 21}, one creature the solar can see within 600 feet. {@actSaveFail} If the creature has 100 {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} or fewer, it dies. It otherwise takes 24 ({@damage 4d8 + 6}) Piercing damage plus 36 ({@damage 8d8}) Radiant damage.

legendary.name: Blinding Gaze
text: {@actSave con} {@dc 25}, one creature the solar can see within 120 feet. {@actSaveFail} The target has the {@condition Blinded|XPHB} condition for 1 minute. {@actSaveSuccessOrFail} The solar can't take this action again until the start of its next turn.

legendary.name: Radiant Teleport
text: The solar teleports up to 60 feet to an unoccupied space it can see. {@actSave dex} {@dc 25}, each creature in a 10-foot {@variantrule Emanation [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Emanation} originating from the solar at its destination space. {@actSaveFail} 11 ({@damage 2d10}) Radiant damage. {@actSaveSuccess} Half damage.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
headerText: The solar casts one of the following spells, requiring no Material components and using Charisma as the spellcasting ability (spell save {@dc 25}):

spellcasting.name: Divine Aid (3/Day)
headerText: The solar casts {@spell Cure Wounds|XPHB} (level 2 version), {@spell Lesser Restoration|XPHB}, or {@spell Remove Curse|XPHB}, using the same spellcasting ability as Spellcasting.

name: Specter
languages: understands Common plus one other language but can't speak
immunities: necrotic; poison; charmed; exhaustion; grappled; paralyzed; petrified; poisoned; prone; restrained; unconscious
resistances: acid; bludgeoning; cold; fire; lightning; piercing; slashing; thunder

traits.name: Incorporeal Movement
text: The specter can move through other creatures and objects as if they were {@variantrule Difficult Terrain|XPHB}. It takes 5 ({@damage 1d10}) Force damage if it ends its turn inside an object.

traits.name: Sunlight Sensitivity
text: While in sunlight, the specter has {@variantrule Disadvantage|XPHB} on ability checks and attack rolls.

actions.name: Life Drain
text: {@atkr m} {@hit 4}, reach 5 ft. {@h}7 ({@damage 2d6}) Necrotic damage. If the target is a creature, its {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB|Hit Point} maximum decreases by an amount equal to the damage taken.

traits.name: Inscrutable
text: No magic can observe the sphinx remotely or detect its thoughts without its permission. Wisdom ({@skill Insight|XPHB}) checks made to ascertain its intentions or sincerity are made with {@variantrule Disadvantage|XPHB}.

traits.name: Legendary Resistance (3/Day, or 4/Day in Lair)
text: If the sphinx fails a saving throw, it can choose to succeed instead.

actions.name: Multiattack
text: The sphinx makes three Claw attacks.

actions.name: Claw
text: {@atkr m} {@hit 8}, reach 5 ft. {@h}14 ({@damage 3d6 + 4}) Slashing damage.

actions.name: Mind-Rending Roar {@recharge 5}
text: {@actSave wis} {@dc 16}, each enemy in a 300-foot {@variantrule Emanation [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Emanation} originating from the sphinx. {@actSaveFail} 35 ({@damage 10d6}) Psychic damage, and the target has the {@condition Incapacitated|XPHB} condition until the start of the sphinx's next turn.

legendary.name: Arcane Prowl
text: The sphinx can teleport up to 30 feet to an unoccupied space it can see, and it makes one Claw attack.

legendary.name: Weight of Years
text: {@actSave con} {@dc 16}, one creature the sphinx can see within 120 feet. {@actSaveFail} The target gains 1 {@condition Exhaustion|XPHB} level. While the target has any {@condition Exhaustion|XPHB} levels, it appears {@dice 3d10} years older. {@actSaveSuccessOrFail} The sphinx can't take this action again until the start of its next turn.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
headerText: The sphinx casts one of the following spells, requiring no Material components and using Intelligence as the spellcasting ability (spell save {@dc 16}):

traits.name: Inscrutable
text: No magic can observe the sphinx remotely or detect its thoughts without its permission. Wisdom ({@skill Insight|XPHB}) checks made to ascertain its intentions or sincerity are made with {@variantrule Disadvantage|XPHB}.

traits.name: Legendary Resistance (3/Day, or 4/Day in Lair)
text: If the sphinx fails a saving throw, it can choose to succeed instead.

actions.name: Multiattack
text: The sphinx makes two Claw attacks and uses Roar.

actions.name: Claw
text: {@atkr m} {@hit 12}, reach 5 ft. {@h}20 ({@damage 4d6 + 6}) Slashing damage.

actions.name: Roar (3/Day)
text: The sphinx emits a magical roar. Whenever it roars, the roar has a different effect, as detailed below (the sequence resets when it takes a {@variantrule Long Rest|XPHB}):

• First Roar. {@actSave wis} {@dc 20}, each enemy in a 500-foot {@variantrule Emanation [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Emanation} originating from the sphinx. {@actSaveFail} The target has the {@condition Frightened|XPHB} condition for 1 minute.

• Second Roar. {@actSave wis} {@dc 20}, each enemy in a 500-foot {@variantrule Emanation [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Emanation} originating from the sphinx. {@actSaveFail} The target has the {@condition Paralyzed|XPHB} condition, and it repeats the save at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success. After 1 minute, it succeeds automatically.

• Third Roar. {@actSave con} {@dc 20}, each enemy in a 500-foot {@variantrule Emanation [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Emanation} originating from the sphinx. {@actSaveFail} 44 ({@damage 8d10}) Thunder damage, and the target has the {@condition Prone|XPHB} condition. {@actSaveSuccess} Half damage only.

legendary.name: Arcane Prowl
text: The sphinx can teleport up to 30 feet to an unoccupied space it can see, and it makes one Claw attack.

legendary.name: Weight of Years
text: {@actSave con} {@dc 16}, one creature the sphinx can see within 120 feet. {@actSaveFail} The target gains 1 {@condition Exhaustion|XPHB} level. While the target has any {@condition Exhaustion|XPHB} levels, it appears {@dice 3d10} years older. {@actSaveSuccessOrFail} The sphinx can't take this action again until the start of its next turn.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
headerText: The sphinx casts one of the following spells, requiring no Material components and using Wisdom as the spellcasting ability (spell save {@dc 20}):

traits.name: Magic Resistance
text: The sphinx has {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

actions.name: Rend
text: {@atkr m} {@hit 5}, reach 5 ft. {@h}5 ({@damage 1d4 + 3}) Slashing damage plus 7 ({@damage 2d6}) Radiant damage.

reactions.name: Burst of Ingenuity (2/Day)
text: {@actTrigger} The sphinx or another creature within 30 feet makes an ability check or a saving throw. {@actResponse} The sphinx adds 2 to the roll.

traits.name: Spider Climb
text: The spider can climb difficult surfaces, including along ceilings, without needing to make an ability check.

traits.name: Web Walker
text: The spider ignores movement restrictions caused by webs, and the spider knows the location of any other creature in contact with the same web.

actions.name: Bite
text: {@atkr m} {@hit 4}, reach 5 ft. {@h}1 Piercing damage plus 2 ({@damage 1d4}) Poison damage.

traits.name: Fiendish Restoration
text: If it dies, the naga returns to life in {@dice 1d6} days and regains all its {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB}. Only a {@spell Wish|XPHB} spell can prevent this trait from functioning.

actions.name: Multiattack
text: The naga makes three attacks, using Bite or Necrotic Ray in any combination.

actions.name: Bite
text: {@atkr m} {@hit 7}, reach 10 ft. {@h}7 ({@damage 1d6 + 4}) Piercing damage plus 14 ({@damage 4d6}) Poison damage.

actions.name: Necrotic Ray
text: {@atkr r} {@hit 6}, range 60 ft. {@h}21 ({@damage 6d6}) Necrotic damage.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
headerText: The naga casts one of the following spells, requiring no Somatic or Material components and using Intelligence as the spellcasting ability (spell save {@dc 14}):

actions.name: Needle Sword
text: {@atkr m} {@hit 6}, reach 5 ft. {@h}6 ({@damage 1d4 + 4}) Piercing damage.

actions.name: Enchanting Bow
text: {@atkr r} {@hit 6}, range 40/160 ft. {@h}1 Piercing damage, and the target has the {@condition Charmed|XPHB} condition until the start of the sprite's next turn.

actions.name: Heart Sight
text: {@actSave cha} {@dc 10}, one creature within 5 feet the sprite can see (Celestials, Fiends, and Undead automatically fail the save). {@actSaveFail} The sprite knows the target's emotions and alignment.

spellcasting.name: Invisibility
headerText: The sprite casts {@spell Invisibility|XPHB} on itself, requiring no spell components and using Charisma as the spellcasting ability.

actions.name: Shortsword
text: {@atkr m} {@hit 4}, reach 5 ft. {@h}5 ({@damage 1d6 + 2}) Piercing damage plus 7 ({@damage 2d6}) Poison damage.

actions.name: Hand Crossbow
text: {@atkr r} {@hit 4}, range 30/120 ft. {@h}5 ({@damage 1d6 + 2}) Piercing damage plus 7 ({@damage 2d6}) Poison damage.

bonusActions.name: Cunning Action
text: The spy takes the {@action Dash|XPHB}, {@action Disengage|XPHB}, or {@action Hide|XPHB} action.

traits.name: Blurred Form
text: Attack rolls against the mephit are made with {@variantrule Disadvantage|XPHB} unless the mephit has the {@condition Incapacitated|XPHB} condition.

traits.name: Death Burst
text: The mephit explodes when it dies. {@actSave dex} {@dc 10}, each creature in a 5-foot {@variantrule Emanation [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Emanation} originating from the mephit. {@actSaveFail} 5 ({@damage 2d4}) Fire damage. {@actSaveSuccess} Half damage.

actions.name: Claw
text: {@atkr m} {@hit 2}, reach 5 ft. {@h}2 ({@damage 1d4}) Slashing damage plus 2 ({@damage 1d4}) Fire damage.

actions.name: Steam Breath {@recharge}
text: {@actSave con} {@dc 10}, each creature in a 15-foot {@variantrule Cone [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Cone}. {@actSaveFail} 5 ({@damage 2d4}) Fire damage, and the target's {@variantrule Speed|XPHB} decreases by 10 feet until the end of the mephit's next turn. {@actSaveSuccess} Half damage only. {@actSaveSuccessOrFail} Being underwater doesn't grant {@variantrule Resistance|XPHB} to this Fire damage.

actions.name: Proboscis
text: {@atkr m} {@hit 5}, reach 5 ft. {@h}6 ({@damage 1d6 + 3}) Piercing damage, and the stirge attaches to the target. While attached, the stirge can't make Proboscis attacks, and the target takes 5 ({@damage 2d4}) Necrotic damage at the start of each of the stirge's turns.
The stirge can detach itself by spending 5 feet of its movement. The target or a creature within 5 feet of it can detach the stirge as an action.

actions.name: Multiattack
text: The giant makes two attacks, using Stone Club or Boulder in any combination.

actions.name: Stone Club
text: {@atkr m} {@hit 9}, reach 15 ft. {@h}22 ({@damage 3d10 + 6}) Bludgeoning damage.

actions.name: Boulder
text: {@atkr r} {@hit 9}, range 60/240 ft. {@h}15 ({@damage 2d8 + 6}) Bludgeoning damage. If the target is a Large or smaller creature, it has the {@condition Prone|XPHB} condition.

reactions.name: Deflect Missile {@recharge 5}
text: {@actTrigger} The giant is hit by a ranged attack roll and takes Bludgeoning, Piercing, or Slashing damage from it. {@actResponse} The giant reduces the damage it takes from the attack by 11 ({@dice 1d10 + 6}), and if that damage is reduced to 0, the giant can redirect some of the attack's force. {@actSave dex} {@dc 17}, one creature the giant can see within 60 feet. {@actSaveFail} 11 ({@damage 1d10 + 6}) Force damage.

name: Stone Golem
languages: understands Common plus two other languages but can't speak
immunities: poison; psychic; charmed; exhaustion; frightened; paralyzed; petrified; poisoned

traits.name: Immutable Form
text: The golem can't shape-shift.

traits.name: Magic Resistance
text: The golem has {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

actions.name: Multiattack
text: The golem makes two attacks, using Slam or Force Bolt in any combination.

actions.name: Slam
text: {@atkr m} {@hit 10}, reach 5 ft. {@h}15 ({@damage 2d8 + 6}) Bludgeoning damage plus 9 ({@damage 2d8}) Force damage.

actions.name: Force Bolt
text: {@atkr r} {@hit 9}, range 120 ft. {@h}22 ({@damage 4d10}) Force damage.

spellcasting.name: Slow {@recharge 5}
headerText: The golem casts the {@spell Slow|XPHB} spell, requiring no spell components and using Constitution as the spellcasting ability (spell save {@dc 17}).

traits.name: Amphibious
text: The giant can breathe air and water.

actions.name: Multiattack
text: The giant makes two attacks, using Storm Sword or Thunderbolt in any combination.

actions.name: Storm Sword
text: {@atkr m} {@hit 14}, reach 10 ft. {@h}23 ({@damage 4d6 + 9}) Slashing damage plus 13 ({@damage 3d8}) Lightning damage.

actions.name: Thunderbolt
text: {@atkr r} {@hit 14}, range 500 ft. {@h}22 ({@damage 2d12 + 9}) Lightning damage, and the target has the {@condition Blinded|XPHB} and {@condition Deafened|XPHB} conditions until the start of the giant's next turn.

actions.name: Lightning Storm {@recharge 5}
text: {@actSave dex} {@dc 18}, each creature in a 10-foot-radius, 40-foot-high {@variantrule Cylinder [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Cylinder} originating from a point the giant can see within 500 feet. {@actSaveFail} 55 ({@damage 10d10}) Lightning damage. {@actSaveSuccess} Half damage.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
headerText: The giant casts one of the following spells, requiring no Material components and using Wisdom as the spellcasting ability (spell save {@dc 18}):

traits.name: Incubus Form
text: When the succubus finishes a {@variantrule Long Rest|XPHB}, it can shape-shift into an {@creature Incubus|XMM}, using that stat block instead of this one.

actions.name: Multiattack
text: The succubus makes one Fiendish Touch attack and uses Charm or Draining Kiss.

actions.name: Fiendish Touch
text: {@atkr m} {@hit 7}, reach 5 ft. {@h}16 ({@damage 2d10 + 5}) Psychic damage.

actions.name: Charm
text: The succubus casts {@spell Dominate Person|XPHB} (level 8 version), requiring no spell components and using Charisma as the spellcasting ability (spell save {@dc 15}).

actions.name: Draining Kiss
text: {@actSave con} {@dc 15}, one creature {@condition Charmed|XPHB} by the succubus within 5 feet. {@actSaveFail} 13 ({@damage 3d8}) Psychic damage. {@actSaveSuccess} Half damage. {@actSaveSuccessOrFail} The target's {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB|Hit Point} maximum decreases by an amount equal to the damage taken.

bonusActions.name: Shape-Shift
text: The succubus shape-shifts to resemble a Medium or Small Humanoid or back into its true form. Its game statistics are the same in each form, except its {@variantrule Fly Speed|XPHB} is available only in its true form. Any equipment it's wearing or carrying isn't transformed.

name: Swarm of Bats
immunities: charmed; frightened; grappled; paralyzed; petrified; prone; restrained; stunned

traits.name: Swarm
text: The swarm can occupy another creature's space and vice versa, and the swarm can move through any opening large enough for a Tiny bat. The swarm can't regain {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} or gain {@variantrule Temporary Hit Points|XPHB}.

actions.name: Bites
text: {@atkr m} {@hit 4}, reach 5 ft. {@h}5 ({@damage 2d4}) Piercing damage, or 2 ({@damage 1d4}) Piercing damage if the swarm is {@status Bloodied|XPHB}.

name: Tarrasque

traits.name: Magic Resistance
text: The tarrasque has {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

traits.name: Reflective Carapace
text: If the tarrasque is targeted by a {@spell Magic Missile|XPHB} spell or a spell that requires a ranged attack roll, roll {@dice 1d6}. On a 1-5, the tarrasque is unaffected. On a 6, the tarrasque is unaffected and reflects the spell, turning the caster into the target.

traits.name: Siege Monster
text: The tarrasque deals double damage to objects and structures.

actions.name: Multiattack

text: The werewolf has {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on an attack roll against a creature if at least one of the werewolf's allies is within 5 feet of the creature and the ally doesn't have the {@condition Incapacitated|XPHB} condition.

actions.name: Multiattack
text: The werewolf makes two attacks, using Scratch or Longbow in any combination. It can replace one attack with a Bite attack.

actions.name: Bite (Wolf or Hybrid Form Only)
text: {@atkr m} {@hit 5}, reach 5 ft. {@h}12 ({@damage 2d8 + 3}) Piercing damage. If the target is a Humanoid, it is subjected to the following effect. {@actSave con} {@dc 12}. {@actSaveFail} The target is cursed. If the cursed target drops to 0 {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB}, it instead becomes a Werewolf under the DM's control and has 10 {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB}. {@actSaveSuccess} The target is immune to this werewolf's curse for 24 hours.

actions.name: Scratch
text: {@atkr m} {@hit 5}, reach 5 ft. {@h}10 ({@damage 2d6 + 3}) Slashing damage.

actions.name: Longbow (Humanoid or Hybrid Form Only)
text: {@atkr r} {@hit 4}, range 150/600 ft. {@h}11 ({@damage 2d8 + 2}) Piercing damage.

bonusActions.name: Shape-Shift
text: The werewolf shape-shifts into a Large wolf-humanoid hybrid or a Medium wolf, or it returns to its true humanoid form. Its game statistics, other than its size, are the same in each form. Any equipment it is wearing or carrying isn't transformed.

traits.name: Ice Walk
text: The dragon can move across and climb icy surfaces without needing to make an ability check. Additionally, {@variantrule Difficult Terrain|XPHB} composed of ice or snow doesn't cost it extra movement.

actions.name: Multiattack
text: The dragon makes two Rend attacks.

actions.name: Rend
text: {@atkr m} {@hit 4}, reach 5 ft. {@h}6 ({@damage 1d8 + 2}) Slashing damage plus 2 ({@damage 1d4}) Cold damage.

actions.name: Cold Breath {@recharge 5}
text: {@actSave con} {@dc 12}, each creature in a 15-foot {@variantrule Cone [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Cone}. {@actSaveFail} 22 ({@damage 5d8}) Cold damage. {@actSaveSuccess} Half damage.

traits.name: Sunlight Sensitivity
text: While in sunlight, the wight has {@variantrule Disadvantage|XPHB} on ability checks and attack rolls.

actions.name: Multiattack
text: The wight makes two attacks, using Necrotic Sword or Necrotic Bow in any combination. It can replace one attack with a use of Life Drain.

actions.name: Necrotic Sword
text: {@atkr m} {@hit 4}, reach 5 ft. {@h}6 ({@damage 1d8 + 2}) Slashing damage plus 4 ({@damage 1d8}) Necrotic damage.

actions.name: Necrotic Bow
text: {@atkr r} {@hit 4}, range 150/600 ft. {@h}6 ({@damage 1d8 + 2}) Piercing damage plus 4 ({@damage 1d8}) Necrotic damage.

actions.name: Life Drain
text: {@actSave con} {@dc 13}, one creature within 5 feet. {@actSaveFail} 6 ({@damage 1d8 + 2}) Necrotic damage, and the target's {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB|Hit Point} maximum decreases by an amount equal to the damage taken.

A Humanoid slain by this attack rises 24 hours later as a {@creature Zombie|XMM} under the wight's control, unless the Humanoid is restored to life or its body is destroyed. The wight can have no more than twelve zombies under its control at a time.

name: Will-o'-Wisp
immunities: lightning; poison; exhaustion; grappled; paralyzed; petrified; poisoned; prone; restrained; unconscious
resistances: acid; bludgeoning; cold; fire; necrotic; piercing; slashing

traits.name: Ephemeral
text: The wisp can't wear or carry anything.

traits.name: Illumination
text: The wisp sheds {@variantrule Bright Light|XPHB} in a 20-foot radius and {@variantrule Dim Light|XPHB} for an additional 20 feet.

traits.name: Incorporeal Movement
text: The wisp can move through other creatures and objects as if they were {@variantrule Difficult Terrain|XPHB}. It takes 5 ({@damage 1d10}) Force damage if it ends its turn inside an object.

actions.name: Shock
text: {@atkr m} {@hit 4}, reach 5 ft. {@h}11 ({@damage 2d8 + 2}) Lightning damage.

bonusActions.name: Consume Life
text: {@actSave con} {@dc 10}, one living creature the wisp can see within 5 feet that has 0 {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB}. {@actSaveFail} The target dies, and the wisp regains 10 ({@dice 3d6}) {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB}.

bonusActions.name: Vanish
text: The wisp and its light have the {@condition Invisible|XPHB} condition until the wisp's {@status Concentration|XPHB} ends on this effect, which ends early immediately after the wisp makes an attack roll or uses Consume Life.

actions.name: Create Specter
text: The wraith targets a Humanoid corpse within 10 feet of itself that has been dead for no longer than 1 minute. The target's spirit rises as a {@creature Specter|XMM} in the space of its corpse or in the nearest unoccupied space. The specter is under the wraith's control. The wraith can have no more than seven specters under its control at a time.

traits.name: Earth Glide
text: The xorn can burrow through nonmagical, unworked earth and stone. While doing so, the xorn doesn't disturb the material it moves through.

traits.name: Treasure Sense
text: The xorn can pinpoint the location of precious metals and stones within 60 feet of itself.

bonusActions.name: Charge
